title: Dynamic Names
description: Ever want to know what painting that is? Or your Tag that is named?
body:
# Overview This Resource Pack changes textures based on their types, names, or other properties. Things like Paintings, Potions, and Name Tags can be different depending on what is going on behind the scenes. ![all items :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rSUdrbZg/images/7d885732b65b260ed584d7b3f10afed74f9d9776.png) # Features The Items with these dynamic names and textures are as follows: - Axolotl Bucket - Salmon Bucket - Name Tags - Axolotl Buckets - Enchanted Golden Apple - Item Frame Visibility - Firework Rockets - Goat Horns - Infested Stones
Upcoming
  • Tropical Fish Buckets
  • All Potions and Bottles
  • Sus Stew
  • Armour Trims
  • Tipped Arrows
  • Tools
  • Armour
  • Paintings
  • Enchanted Books

And potentially more!

# Credit Thanks to [DGA](https://www.curseforge.com/members/diamondgamerash/projects) on CurseForge for inital idea! Sprites were custom made. Thanks to [Oozebull](https://www.minecraftforum.net/members/Oozebull) on the [Minecraft Forums](https://www.minecraftforum.net/) for helping me with some of the code. DGA did make [similar things](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/paintings-cit-pack) in this pack AFTER I'd already started working on it, but it's too late to stop. :P
